events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: a one-tooth timing mark misalignment is a hard fail (zero-tolerance spec, not a range), rated high risk due to potential valve/piston interference, with rework actions (re-align to OEM marks, hand-rotate to verify clearance, inspect for contact damage) before close-out.
